summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IndCoders community website. Backend APIs working with 83.3% success rate, frontend UI and mobile responsiveness working perfectly at 100% success rate. Contact form integration fully functional.

minor_bugs.issue: API accepts invalid data (empty names, invalid emails) without validation
minor_bugs.impact: Should return 422 validation errors but returns 200 instead
minor_bugs.note: Does not break core functionality - contact form still works correctly

passed_tests: Hero section renders with correct title and subtitle
Navbar sticky behavior with all navigation links working
Smooth scroll navigation to all sections
About section with 3 cards (Mission, Vision, Why We Exist)
Why Choose Us section with all 6 feature cards
Projects section with 4 project cards and tech stack tags
What We Do section with 4 service cards
Team section with 3 team member cards with images
Contact form submits successfully to backend API
Contact form clears after successful submission
Contact information displays correctly (email, phone numbers)
Footer with quick links, contact info, and social links
Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu
Mobile navigation and contact form working
Dark theme with modern gradients (blue, purple, cyan)

success_percentage.mobile: 100% (fully responsive with working navigation and forms)
